message:
The other day, while rummaging through our closet for old go-bag essentials, I stumbled upon a dusty box of board games from our kids' younger years. Remember those? We used to have family game nights that sparked so much laughter and fun! It made me realize how much joy we can find in low-tech activities, especially when life gets a little hectic. 

As I set aside a couple of games to introduce to my kids again, I also took a moment to check off our emergency plans and ensure our go-bags were updated. It’s a comforting feeling to know we’re ready, but it’s even better to connect with my family in the process. 

What’s your favorite way to unplug and have fun with loved ones? 

P.S. This little refresher helped me think about our preparedness in a different light!
